creator: hq@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi David,

devel/apache-ant is a critical port regarding the Java ports framework.
Indeed, lots of ports depend on it to build and updates to this port
requires caution. I am willing to submit your patch for an experimental
build on the cluster. However, there is already a Java-related patch
that is being tested on the cluster [1].

Regarding maintainership, I strongly believe that java@FreeBSD.org has
to remain as a maintainer so that nothing can be commited to the port
that has not been approved by the Java ports team I beforehand.

I am sorry for the lack of feedback on the topic. I'll try to a bit more
verbose from now.

Herve


[1] [MAINTAINER][PATCH] bsd.java.mk: remove deprecated syntax support
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104136
